LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GO CAR RENTALS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED "PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR AN ORDER TO STAY THE PENDING LITIGATION" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GO CAR RENTALS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant's unopposed "petition to compel arbitration and for an order to stay the pending litigation" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
